description: Diagnostic recuperation : sleep deep-dive (score, stages, HRV nuit, breathing, awakenings) + stress diurne + body battery + heatmap + overreaching detector. Use case : quand tu te sens crame, identifier la cause (sommeil ou stress).

panels.title: Sleep Stages (h) per night — 14d
panels.description: Target: >1h30 deep + >1h30 REM. Low awake time.

panels.title: Avg Sleep Stress (30d)
panels.description: Average stress during sleep. Target: low (<25). High = poor parasympathetic recovery.

panels.title: Stress vs Sleep Score — correlation
panels.description: Rising stress + falling sleep score over several days = pre-overreaching or anxiety signal.

panels.title: Stress vs Training Load — overreaching detector
panels.description: Daily stress vs training load. Both rising together + declining performance = signal to reduce load.

panels.title: Sleep Regularity (heatmap hour × day)

targets.query: SELECT median("level") FROM "Sleep Levels" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h)

panels.description: Bed/wake regularity over selected range. Clear horizontal bands = stable rhythm.

panels.title: Month at a Glance — Intraday (30d)
panels.description: Band wearing (watch observance) + HR zones + BB + Stress + Steps per hour.

panels.title: HR Histogram Heatmap
panels.description: HR distribution over time. Light night bands (low HR) / active daytime.

panels.title: Body Battery Level Change (low/high per day)
panels.description: Daily low/high BB trajectory — different from day-only stat.

panels.title: Sleep Intraday — HR + SpO2 + Overnight HRV
panels.description: Overlaid nightly metrics to correlate poor sleep with desaturation or elevated HR.

panels.title: Last Sleep (piechart, last night)

targets.query: SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.description: Last night snapshot — complements the 14-day barchart.

panels.title: Stress Overview stacked (30d)
panels.description: Breakdown by level (low/rest/medium/uncategorized/high) over selected range.

title: 06 Recovery Diagnostics
